2605.04752.title: Hybrid Congestion Classification Framework Using Flow-Guided Attention and Empirical Mode Decomposition
2605.04752.paper_summary: Accurate traffic congestion classification requires models that jointly capture roadway scene context and non-stationary traffic motion, yet most prior work treats these requirements in isolation. Vision-based methods often depend on appearance cues with standard temporal pooling, which can bias predictions toward static infrastructure, whereas signal-based approaches characterize temporal dynamics but lack the spatial context needed for scene-level localization. These complementary limitations motivate a unified framework that links motion evidence to spatial feature selection while preserving data-adaptive temporal characterization. This study therefore proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid approach that couples motion-guided attention with empirical, data-driven temporal decomposition. Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention so that RGB features are refined toward motion-relevant regions. In parallel, aggregated flow statistics form compact motion traces that are decomposed using Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) to extract intrinsic temporal components. The resulting EMD embedding is fused with learned spatiotemporal representations to classify light, medium, and heavy congestion. Experiments on 1,050 five-second clips from four surveillance networks show that FLO-EMD achieves 97.5% overall test accuracy (weighted F1 = 0.9742), outperforming established baselines and remaining robust across diverse environmental conditions; ablation and sensitivity analyses further quantify the contributions of EMD, the number of intrinsic mode functions, and the selected motion descriptors.
2605.04752.paper_summary_zh: 準確的交通擁堵分類需要模型能夠共同捕捉道路場景上下文和非穩態交通運動，然而大多數先前的研究將這些要求孤立對待。基於視覺的方法通常依賴於外觀線索和標準的時間池化，這可能使預測偏向靜態基礎設施，而基於信號的方法則特徵化時間動態，但缺乏場景級定位所需的空間上下文。這些互補的限制促使了一個統一的框架，將運動證據與空間特徵選擇聯繫起來，同時保持數據自適應的時間特徵化。因此，本研究提出了FLO-EMD，一種將運動引導注意力與經驗性、數據驅動的時間分解相結合的混合方法。密集光流引導通道和空間注意力，使得RGB特徵朝向與運動相關的區域進行精煉。與此同時，聚合的流統計形成緊湊的運動軌跡，這些軌跡通過經驗模態分解（EMD）進行分解，以提取內在的時間組件。生成的EMD嵌入與學習的時空表示融合，以分類輕度、中度和重度擁堵。在來自四個監控網絡的1,050個五秒片段的實驗中，FLO-EMD實現了97.5%的整體測試準確率（加權F1 = 0.9742），超越了既定基準，並在多樣的環境條件下保持穩健；消融和敏感性分析進一步量化了EMD、內在模態函數的數量以及所選運動描述子的貢獻。
2605.04752.author: Eugene Kofi Okrah Denteh et.al.
2605.04752.authors: Eugene Kofi Okrah Denteh, Blessing Agyei Kyem, Joshua Kofi Asamoah, Armstrong Aboah
